global_description: Medium-sized feline with a sleek, muscular body, covered in golden-yellow fur with distinctive black rosettes and spots. The head is broad with small rounded ears, and the tail is long and thick, aiding in balance.

part_details.head: Broad with small rounded ears and black markings
part_details.body: Sleek and muscular, covered in golden-yellow fur with black rosettes
part_details.tail: Long and thick, aiding in balance
part_details.legs: Strong and muscular, with black spots
part_details.fur: Golden-yellow with black rosettes and spots

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail extending behind
